user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new paid time off type, so that employees can request that category of paid leave.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Paid Time Off screen; When I click Add new paid time off and enter the type, number of days, and tracking unit; Then the paid time off type is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view paid time off types with their number of time offs, tracking unit, FMLA flag, and applicability, so that I can review the leave catalog.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Paid Time Off screen; When the list loads; Then I see each type's number of time off(s), hours/days tracking, FMLA time off type, and applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing paid time off type, so that I can update its allowance or applicability.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Paid Time Off screen; When I click Edit on a paid time off row and change its values; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the details of a paid time off type, so that I can confirm its configuration and excluded position levels.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Paid Time Off screen; When I click View on a row; Then the paid time off type details and excluded position levels are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to organize leave types, so that I can control the order in which time off types appear.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Paid Time Off screen; When I click Organize Leave Type and reorder the types; Then the new ordering is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the paid time off list, so that I can navigate all 20 types and see current data.
acceptance_criteria: Given the paid time off list spans multiple pages; When I click next/last or refresh; Then the list navigates and reloads accordingly
